info.title: Blues Notehub API
info.description: The Notehub API allows you to programmatically interact with Blues Notehub to manage projects, devices, fleets, events, routes, monitors, firmware updates, billing, and usage data.

post.description: Generate an OAuth bearer token that can be used to authenticate subsequent Notehub API requests.

client_id.description: Client ID from the Programmatic API access section of a Notehub project

client_secret.description: Client secret from the Programmatic API access section of a Notehub project

get.description: Retrieves an array of Notehub billing accounts tied to an authentication token.
Retrieve all projects accessible to the authenticated user.

post.description: Establish a new project within your account.

billing_account_uid.description: Billing account UID to associate with the project

get.description: Fetch details about a specific project by its identifier.
Retrieve project information using a product identifier.

post.description: Duplicate a project with optional route and fleet exclusion.

get.description: List all collaborators assigned to the project.
Retrieve all products associated with the project.

post.description: Create a new product under the specified project.

delete.description: Remove a product from the project.

get.description: List all fleets within the project.

post.description: Create a new fleet in the project.

get.description: Retrieve information about a specific fleet.

delete.description: Remove a fleet from the project.

get.description: Retrieve devices associated with a project.
Retrieve single device information.

delete.description: Remove a device from a project.

post.description: Prevent a device from connecting to Notehub.
Allow a disabled device to reconnect to Notehub.

get.description: Fetch device-level environment variables.

delete.description: Remove a specific environment variable from a device.

get.description: View all environment variables across device, fleet, and project levels.
Access device health records.
Retrieve device service plans.
Fetch the most recent device events.
Retrieve device connection sessions.

post.description: Transmit a signal to a device.

get.description: List all notefiles on a device.

delete.description: Remove a notefile from a device.

post.description: Add a note to a queue notefile on a device.

get.description: View note modifications in a notefile.

post.description: Create a database note on a device.

get.description: Retrieve a specific note from a notefile.

delete.description: Delete a note from a notefile.

get.description: Identify which fleets a specific device belongs to.

put.description: Assign a device to one or more fleets.

delete.description: Remove device membership from specified fleets.

get.description: Obtain a device's public key.
Retrieve public keys for multiple devices.
List devices in a specific fleet.
List all environment variables defined at the project level.

put.description: Define or update project-level environment variables.

delete.description: Remove a specific environment variable from the project.

get.description: Obtain the hierarchical structure of project environment variables.
Retrieve all environment variables assigned to a specific fleet.

put.description: Set or modify fleet-level environment variables.

delete.description: Delete an environment variable from a fleet.

get.description: Access the hierarchical structure for fleet-specific environment variables.
Retrieve an array of Notehub events filtered by project or product UID.
Retrieve events using cursor-based pagination.
Retrieve events filtered by fleet UID within a project.
Retrieve route logs associated with a specific event.
Retrieves an array of routes associated with a Notehub project.

post.description: Create a new route within a Notehub project.

get.description: Fetches a single route by its identifier.

delete.description: Delete a single route by its RouteUID.

get.description: Get an array of route logs associated with a Notehub project.
Get all alert monitors for a Notehub project.

post.description: Create an alert monitor for a Notehub project.

get.description: Get an alert monitor for a Notehub project.

put.description: Update an alert monitor for a Notehub project.

delete.description: Delete an alert monitor for a Notehub project.

post.description: Define a global JSONata transformation rule.

get.description: List available firmware versions for deployment.
Check current firmware update status for all project devices.
Retrieve device firmware update history across the project.
Check firmware update status for a specific device.
Obtain DFU history for a single device.
Retrieve data usage in bytes for a project.
Retrieve event counts for a project.
Retrieve route execution statistics for a project.
Retrieve session metrics for a project.

bearerAuth.description: Use a Personal Access Token or OAuth bearer token obtained from /oauth2/token

role.description: User role on the billing account

tags.name: Environment Variables
tags.description: Environment variable management at project, fleet, and device levels
